focus.description: For exponential models, express as a logarithm the solution to $ab^{ct} = d$ where a, c, and d are numbers and the base b is 2, 10, or e; evaluate the logarithm using technology.

descendants.description: Create equations and inequalities in one variable and use them to solve problems. Include equations arising from linear and quadratic functions, and simple rational and exponential functions.

learningComponents.description: Solve an exponential function in base 2, 10, and e using logarithms
learningComponents.author: Achievement Network

learningComponents.description: Use technology to evaluate a logarithm
learningComponents.author: Achievement Network
